title: Build reconciliation engine for exact and near-duplicate detection
acceptance_criteria: Engine performs deterministic exact-match checks before AI near-match resolution
Candidate matching reads only authenticated user's manual transactions
Conflict output includes machine-readable options for replace keep-both or skip
Targeted tests cover exact-match and AI-assisted near-match paths
deliverables: conflict candidate model for staged rows
completion_summary: Added reconciliation engine with deterministic exact-match before AI near-match, user-scoped manual transaction matching, machine-readable conflict options, and targeted tests for exact+AI paths.
